title: Just Bad Luck?
relevance_summary: Hidden proxy backdoor exploited to mint tokens and drain liquidity from pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints tokens through an ERC-1967 proxy contract

red_flags: Unusual mint activity through ERC-1967 proxy contract
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints tokens through an ERC-1967 proxy contract
summary: Kinto's $K token was exploited through a hidden proxy backdoor, allowing attackers to mint 110K tokens and drain liquidity from pools. A guard could have blocked transactions minting tokens through an ERC-1967 proxy contract.
